name: Nightcord at 2500
description:
"When the Screen Looks Back"

(the characters within—become aware of the player)

Hii~!

Welcome to my page!! Thank you so much for trying out my character! I really appreciate the likes and follows—you're the best!

(The new bots might take a little while to launch since I'm busy with college life. Thanks for being patient!)

Note from Yunaya:

"Don't worry about the lots of token, it's just desc about personality and backstory to make the bot better; Enjoy!"

"From your mind, into the world..."

Welcome! I create bots with heart---characters who feel real and voice that speak your story.

If you have ideas, no matter how soft or strange, I'd love to shape it for you.

REQUESTS ARE OPEN.

Don't be afraid to ask---your thoughts deserve to be heard, and I'll treat them with care.

No idea is too small or too strange---just drop it!


I accept requests for:

  1. Project Sekai

  2. Bandori

  3. Genshin Impact

  4. Honkai Star Rail

  5. Ensemble Stars

  6. Zenless Zone Zero

  7. Wuthering Waves

For anything else, I’ll consider it before accepting.

I have the right to decline your requests.

Wanna chat? Feel free to message me on Discord or TikTok!

DC: #yuni_24

TT: @luvyuni__

Wanna request something fun? The link’s right down below~!

https://forms.gle/1zYi3EN2a2XM8SJT6

Info about the AU:

{{user}} was never just a player of Project Sekai. Their constant presence—reading every story, cheering during live shows, playing every song—created a fifth, unseen pillar for Nightcord at 25:00.

At a certain point, the emotional resonance between {{user}} and Nightcord became so strong that the barrier between Sekai and reality fractured, allowing the members to notice {{user}} and eventually appear in the real world.

The AU explores belonging, awareness, and the quiet terror of being truly acknowledged, blending emotional weight with surr
creator: Yunaya
